questions.question_text_full: Select the option that expresses the given sentence in direct speech. My friend asked me where I planned to go for a vacation.

options.text: My friend said to me, “Where have you planned to go for a vacation?”
My friend said to me, “Where you have planned to go for a vacation?”
My friend said to me, “Where do you plan to go for a vacation?”
My friend said to me, “Where are you planning to go for a vacation?”

questions.question_text_full: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. You should / avail this opportunity / to demonstrate / your skills.

options.text: You should
your skills
avail this opportunity
to demonstrate

questions.question_text_full: Select the option that expresses the given sentence in active voice. Absolute liberty is enjoyed by us in matters of food and dress.

options.text: We are enjoying absolute liberty in matters of food and dress.
We enjoy absolute liberty in matters of food and dress.
We will enjoy absolute liberty in matters of food and dress.
We have enjoyed absolute liberty in matters of food and dress.

questions.question_text_full: Select the option that expresses the given sentence in reported speech. The old man said to her, “Good luck to you! May you succeed in your venture!”

options.text: The old man exclaimed good luck to you and wished that she may succeed in her venture.
The old man wished you good luck and prayed that you might succeed in your venture.
The old man wished her good luck and prayed that she might succeed in her venture.
The old man told her good luck and prayed that may she succeed in her venture.

questions.question_text_full: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. The manager / took him / at task / for his negligence.

options.text: for his negligence
The manager
at task
took him

questions.question_text_full: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words. Central character in a story or play

options.text: Emulator
Contender
Protagonist
Adversary
